pageContext.name: Batman™: The Court of Owls
pageContext.description: To eradicate us fully, you'd need to rip apart the foundation of the city. You would need to tear Gotham to the ground.   Sideshow Art Prints presents the Batman™: The Court of Owls Fine Art Print, an original DC Comics art print by acclaimed illustrator Alex Garner that undermines the very framework of Gotham City as Bruce Wayne knows it.  Inspired by the acclaimed comic book storyline, this exciting illustration drops the Dark Knight into a clandestine cabal meeting for the fate of his beloved city. Since Gotham was founded, the Court of Owls has pulled the strings, wielding their wealth for political influence and power. Here, Batman comes face to masked face with the anonymous crowds, who raise a toast to the surprise spectacle. A pair of Talons, lethal Court assassins, confront the Caped Crusader, while other elite members of the organization casually observe the battle that was over before it even began.  Each Batman: The Court of Owls Fine Art Print features an authorized, automated artist signature and an embossed Seal of Authenticity as a part of the limited edition of 375 pieces. DC Comics fans can prove their loyalty to the unstoppable secret society with this can't-miss piece of Batman artwork for their home collections.  Bring the darkness home to roost! Add the Batman: The Court of Owls Fine Art Print to your DC Comics collection today.
